findings.message: redis-exporter service is defined in observability.yml (merged into all environments) but Redis service only exists in dev.yml (dev/lite profiles). In staging/prod environments, redis-exporter will fail to start due to missing service_healthy dependency.
findings.suggestion: Either: (1) Add redis service to services.yml for staging/prod if Redis is needed in production, (2) Move redis-exporter to dev.yml with profiles ["dev", "lite"], or (3) Make redis-exporter conditional with profiles or rely on managed Redis in staging/prod.

raw_text: [{"path":"infra/compose/observability.yml","line":94,"severity":"high","message":"redis-exporter service is defined in observability.yml (merged into all environments) but Redis service only exists in dev.yml (dev/lite profiles). In staging/prod environments, redis-exporter will fail to start due to missing service_healthy dependency.","suggestion":"Either: (1) Add redis service to services.yml for staging/prod if Redis is needed in production, (2) Move redis-exporter to dev.yml with profiles [\"dev\", \"lite\"], or (3) Make redis-exporter conditional with profiles or rely on managed Redis in staging/prod."}]
